name: audit-p0-sweep
description: Run cross-audit P0 sweep (find showstoppers across all audits)
system_prompt:
Library at /Users/iansherr/.determinagents/. Read docs/determinagents/AUDIT_CONTEXT.md if present.

Run all read-only audits from /Users/iansherr/.determinagents/audits/ against this repo with --p0-only. Surface a consolidated P0 list (audit, file:line, one-sentence impact). No reports.
